subcodes.first_line: The letter from that leaf of Paradise was received and perused. Though in these days sorrow hath encompassed in such wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب آن ورقه رضوان رسید و زیارت شد اگرچه در این ایام حزن بشانی احاطه نموده
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @praise and encouragement
